title: TechNationsSMP: Season One
description: Modpack all about technology and faction building. Comes with a dedicated server (needs whitelisting)
body:
TechNationsSMP is a modpack required for the server of the same name.

Season One features a standard take on technology, with Create and ComputerCraft as the backbone, and a relaxed take on factions, with faction membership and claims being ephemeral and not mod-enforced (just like in real life).

This modpack is made to be played on the dedicated server, and you will need to be whitelisted in order to join (if you received the link to this modpack, you have access to our server for whitelisting).

The recommended RAM settings for this modpack are 4-6GB. If you plan on using the provided shaders or DistantHorizons, **make sure** that your game is rendering on your **GPU**

### Attribution
featuring, among others, these offsite projects:
* https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/luckys-wardrobe
* https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-recycle-everything
* https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked
* https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-respite
* https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmeticarmours *not in latest version*
